MigrationDecision: Installation creates/uses the framework schema; no external dependency.
Name is supplied by the operator; no concrete database name is stored in executable logic.
Earlier approaches used environment-specific logging sources. Only the adapter requirement is retained; no object names or static dependency are migrated.
Metadata enrichment may be added later behind a dynamic, validated adapter contract.
Application-specific queues and domain tables are outside the generic diagnostic core.
Replaced by framework-owned parser functions under [monitor].
No legacy helper object is required by the framework.
Discovered dynamically; distribution details are optional and protected by a deep-analysis class.
Read only when explicitly requested and when an existing session/target exposes a usable path.
